pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh script explicitly require the agent to create a tiddler with this exact title to be evaluated.
Task description and export_result.sh script explicitly require the state tiddler to have this exact name to evaluate scaling correctly.

privileged_info_summary: The Baguette recipe ingredient data (Bread Flour, Water, Salt, Instant Yeast) is synthetically generated by the setup script using standard baker's percentages (1000g flour, 70% hydration, 2% salt, 0.7% yeast). The required target tiddler title 'Baguette Calculator' and state tiddler name '$:/state/baguette-yield' are verified directly against the export script expectations and task instructions.
